summary: Complete testing of Email Template System for IDSEA Iteration 4. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Email template system fully implemented with 4 templates (registration_submitted, membership_approved, event_notification, event_participation)
Batch notification system correctly queues 50 emails per 30 minutes to avoid email blocking
Certificate PDFs generated on-the-fly (NOT stored in DB) and attached to welcome/participation emails
SMTP email delivery is in DEMO mode - email logs are created but actual delivery skipped without valid SMTP credentials
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up test members/events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email template system fully tested. 4 templates: registration_submitted, membership_approved, event_notification, event_participation. All CRUD operations work. Preview renders sample data correctly. Templates can be edited and reset to default. Email triggers work: member apply creates registration email log, member approve creates welcome email log with cert, event notify queues batch notifications, event close triggers participation cert emails.

email_templates_crud.GET /api/admin/email-templates: Returns 4 templates with key, name, subject, body, variables, is_default fields
email_templates_crud.GET /api/admin/email-templates/{key}: Returns full template details for each template type
email_templates_crud.PUT /api/admin/email-templates/{key}: Updates template subject/body, marks as customized
email_templates_crud.POST /api/admin/email-templates/{key}/pr: Returns rendered HTML with sample data (Dr. John Doe, etc.)
email_templates_crud.POST /api/admin/email-templates/{key}/re: Resets template to default, removes customizations

email_triggers.PUT /api/admin/members/{id}/approve: Creates email_logs entry with recipient_group='membership_approved' and generates cert PDF
email_triggers.POST /api/admin/events/{id}/notify: Accepts membership_type param (all/academic/entrepreneur/corporate), queues batch notifications
email_triggers.PUT /api/admin/events/{id}/close: Sets event status to 'completed', queues participation cert emails

frontend_ui.sidebar_navigation: Email Templates nav item present in sidebar with data-testid='nav-email-templates'
frontend_ui.template_cards: 4 template cards displayed with Preview, Edit buttons. Shows template name, description, subject, variables
frontend_ui.preview_modal: Shows rendered HTML email with sample data. No unrendered {{placeholders}}
frontend_ui.edit_modal: Shows subject input, body textarea (HTML), available variables with click-to-copy. Save Template button works
frontend_ui.customization_badge: Templates show 'Default' or 'Customized' badge based on state. Reset button appears for customized templates
frontend_ui.events_notify_button: Notify button present on upcoming/ongoing events with data-testid='notify-event-btn'
frontend_ui.events_close_button: Close Event button present on upcoming/ongoing events with data-testid='close-event-btn'
frontend_ui.notify_modal: Membership type dropdown (All/Academic/Entrepreneur/Corporate) with data-testid='notify-type-select'. Explains batch sending (50 per 30 mins)

mocked_apis_list: SMTP email delivery - settings saved to DB but no real emails sent without valid SMTP credentials. Email logs are created for tracking.
